title: The Battle of al-Shammasiyyah Gate
description: In this year, a battle took place at al-Shammasiyyah Gate.608 Harthamah was taken prisoner in it. A report of the reasons for the battle, how it took place, and its results follows. According to 'Ali b. Yazid, who said: Harthamah was encamped at the Bin Canal (Nahr Bin), protected by a wall and trench. He had prepared manjanigs and arradahs, and had stationed ` Ubaydallah b. al-Waddah at al-Shammasiyyah. From time to time he would go forth, but he would halt at the Khurasan Gate, 609 fearful of the men of the army, not desiring to fight.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
